profile.title: Restaurant Profile

profile.languageHelp: Customers can override this language with the picker on your ordering page.

menu.title: Menu
menu.confirmDeleteCategory: Delete this category and all its items?

services.title: Restaurant Services
services.subtitle: Enable and configure each service your restaurant offers.
services.configureReservations: Configure reservation times, tables, and availability in Table Reservations settings.
services.autoAcceptHelp: When ON, customer orders confirm instantly with your restaurant's default prep time (Pickup: {pickup} min, Delivery: {delivery} min). When OFF, new orders sit as "pending" in /admin/orders until you accept them manually.

delivery.title: Delivery Zones
delivery.subtitle: Define the areas you deliver to. Each zone can have its own fee, minimum, and ETA.

payments.title: Payments
payments.helpText: Enter your Stripe keys to accept card payments on your ordering page.

serviceFees.title: Service Fees
serviceFees.subtitle: Add convenience fees, holiday surcharges, or other charges that apply automatically to customer orders.
serviceFees.noFeesHelp: Click "Add Fee" to create your first surcharge.
serviceFees.daysHelp: Leave all unselected to apply every day.

mapSettings.title: Map Settings
mapSettings.subtitle: Choose how delivery maps are rendered on your ordering page.
mapSettings.googleApiKeyHelp: Required when using Google Maps. Restrict to your domain for safety.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.customerEmailsHelp: Choose which automated emails are sent to your customers.
notifications.staffRecipientsHelp: Add up to several email addresses that should receive notifications.

promotions.title: Promotions & Coupons
promotions.subtitle: Run automatic promotions or one-off coupon codes for your customers.

socialMedia.title: Social Media
socialMedia.subtitle: Connect your social accounts. Customers see them as clickable icons on your ordering page.
socialMedia.customerPreviewBody: Saved links appear as a row of clickable icons at the bottom of your customer ordering page.
socialMedia.aiPostsBody: Fill in a quick weekly form (specials, events, promotions) and we'll draft posts you approve in one click.
socialMedia.roadmapScheduleBody: Connect Instagram, Facebook, X and TikTok. Approve drafts in batches, we post them on schedule.
socialMedia.roadmapTemplateBody: Pre-built templates for daily specials, events, behind-the-scenes — fill the blanks, get a polished post.
socialMedia.roadmapAutoBody: Once you trust the drafts, switch to auto-publish and we'll keep your feeds active hands-free.

autopilot.title: Autopilot
autopilot.subtitle: Automated emails that grow your repeat customers.
autopilot.secondOrderHelp: Send a discount code to first-time customers after their first order.
autopilot.cartAbandonmentHelp: Reach out to customers who added items but didn't check out.
autopilot.reengagementHelp: Win back customers who haven't ordered in a while.

domain.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this domain? You can re-connect it later.
domain.dnsInstructions: Add these records at your DNS provider, then click Re-check.

footer.copyright: © {year} Fee Free Ordering. All rights reserved.
footer.tagline: The fee-free ordering platform for independent restaurants.

home.heroTitle: Take orders online without the fees.
home.heroSubtitle: Run pickup, delivery, table reservations, and a kitchen display from one place. Keep 100% of every order.

stats.noFeesDesc: Keep every dollar of every order.
stats.fastSetupDesc: Up and running in minutes — no integration team needed.
stats.allLanguagesDesc: Customer ordering page, admin, kitchen, and emails — all translated.

home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to run online ordering
home.ctaTitle: Ready to keep 100% of your sales?
home.ctaSubtitle: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Built for independent restaurants — everything in one place.

ordering.title: Customer ordering
ordering.browseDesc: Customers browse your menu, customize items, and check out in seconds.
ordering.pizzaDesc: Half-and-half toppings, crust styles, and modifier groups for any pizza.
ordering.reservationsDesc: Take bookings online with optional deposits and pre-ordering.

kitchen.title: Kitchen operations
kitchen.displayDesc: Orders show up live on the kitchen screen with status buttons and prep times.
kitchen.printingDesc: Print to thermal printers via PrintNode — customer and kitchen receipts.
kitchen.notificationsDesc: Customers get order confirmations; staff get notified of new orders.

growth.title: Marketing & growth
growth.promotionsDesc: Run percent-off, free delivery, BOGO, and scheduled promotions.
growth.autopilotDesc: Win back lost customers automatically with second-order and abandonment emails.
growth.multilingualDesc: Serve customers in their language — admin, kitchen, ordering, and emails.

pricing.title: Free forever. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.subtitle: The core ordering platform is free for every restaurant. Unlock individual paid features as you grow.
pricing.freeSubtitle: Everything you need to start taking orders today.
freeIncludes: Embeddable widget for your existing site
pricing.addOnsSubtitle: Unlock paid features individually. Cancel anytime — no contracts.

online_payments.name: Online Payments
online_payments.desc: Accept credit cards through Stripe Connect. Money lands in your account, not ours.

hosted_website.name: Sales Optimized Website
hosted_website.desc: A polished marketing page at your-name.feefreeordering.com — auto-generated from your menu.

custom_domain.name: Custom Domain
custom_domain.desc: Bring your own domain (e.g. ordermyrestaurant.com) and we'll host the site there.

advanced_promos.name: Advanced Promo Marketing
advanced_promos.desc: Customer segmentation, automated email campaigns, lapsed-customer win-backs.

branded_mobile_app.name: Branded Mobile App
branded_mobile_app.desc: Submit your own iOS + Android app to the stores with your branding.

pos_module.name: POS Module
pos_module.desc: In-house point-of-sale for staff to ring up walk-in orders alongside online ones.

reservation_deposits.name: Reservation Deposits
reservation_deposits.desc: Charge a refundable deposit when guests book a table to reduce no-shows.

pricing.trialNote: No credit card required. No contracts.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before signing up.

items.q: Do you charge a commission on orders?
items.a: No. We charge a flat monthly subscription. You keep 100% of every order.
Most restaurants are taking orders within 30 minutes. Import your menu from PDF or add items manually.

items.q: Do you support pickup AND delivery?
items.a: Yes. You configure each service independently with its own ETA, fees, and minimum order.
Connect your own Stripe account directly. We never touch the funds — they go straight to your bank.

items.q: Can I use a thermal receipt printer?
items.a: Yes. We integrate with PrintNode for ESC/POS thermal printers (Star, Epson, etc.).
Yes. The reservation system supports table-by-table management, pre-orders, and optional deposits.
English, French, Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese — across customer ordering, kitchen display, admin panel, and emails.
Yes. Percent-off, fixed discounts, free delivery, BOGO, scheduled promotions, and one-off coupon codes.
Yes. The core ordering platform is free forever — no credit card, no trial countdown. You pay only if you choose to subscribe to an individual add-on like Online Payments or a Custom Domain.

demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: Three preview surfaces — try them all.

cards.orderingDesc: Browse the menu and place a test order as a customer.
cards.kitchenDesc: See incoming orders on the kitchen screen in real time.
cards.adminDesc: Manage menu, hours, orders, and settings as a restaurant owner.

signup.title: Get started in 5 minutes
signup.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card required.
